title: Charlie's Advancements+
description: Adds more advancements to the game.
body:
![The Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b9b5a167beff1c3146961ce2b8ffac2df7095473.png)

**Charlie's Advancements+ is a simple mod that adds quite alot of new advancements to the game!**



Ever think, "Hey, why isn't this an advancement? It makes so much sense!"

Well this mod adds that advancement, AND MORE!


Here's some examples of advancements this mod adds to the game!

- **FIRE!** - _Light a Fire_
- **Soul Survivor** - _Obtain all 3 Soul Lights_
- **Stop and smell the Roses** - _Gather all 19 different Flower types_
  
AND MANY MORE


Have an idea that you think should be added to the mod? Comment on CurseForge, and if it's good, I'll add it!

You can check out my other projects [here](https://modrinth.com/user/TChar1ie)
